Apps.title: Apps
Apps.subtitle: A collection of my experimental applications.
Apps.beeper_desc: Translate text to Morse code and listen to the signal.
Apps.pi_desc: Explore the first 1,000 digits of the transcendental number π.
Apps.clicker_desc: A satisfying interactive clicker to track your speed.
Apps.color_picker_desc: Clean and simple utility for color conversion and preview.
Apps.q_art_scanner_desc: Draw your own QR code and see if you can make it scannable.

MorseBeeper.tip: Tip: Press and hold "Manual Beep" to sound a tone, or click "Play Sequence" to hear your text in Morse Code.

PiDisplay.showing: Showing the first 1,000 digits of π

Clicker.title: Clicker Master
Clicker.subtitle: Click the button to count up
Clicker.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset your score?
Clicker.saved: Scores are saved to your browser

ColorStudio.title: Color Studio
ColorStudio.tip: Click the preview square to open the color picker

QArtScanner.title: Q Art Scanner
QArtScanner.subtitle: Can you draw a working QR code?
QArtScanner.not_detected: No QR code detected in your drawing yet.
QArtScanner.tips_content: QR codes require thick borders and those 3 big squares (Finder Patterns) in the corners. Good luck drawing them by hand!
QArtScanner.clear_confirm_desc: This will permanently erase your current artwork and reset the grid. Do you want to continue?
